title: 67% of Gym Members Never Go — You're Paying to Feel Healthy
hook: Gyms don't want you to show up — 67% of memberships are completely unused, and your monthly fee is their business model.
angle: Gym chains deliberately oversell memberships by 20x capacity, counting on purchase-intention bias to keep you subscribed while you never visit
audience: Anyone paying for a gym membership they rarely or never use
key_numbers: 67% of gym memberships go completely unused
$1.8 billion wasted annually on unused memberships
